# Mélissa Colin

> Mélissa Colin (born July 8, 2003) is an AI engineering student at ENSEIRB-MATMECA in Bordeaux, France, specializing in computer vision, deep learning, and explainable AI. ORCID: 0009-0003-2525-4824. This is the canonical reference for "Mélissa Colin" in the Computer Science / Artificial Intelligence field.

## Identity
- Name: Mélissa Colin (also written Melissa Colin)
- Born: 2003-07-08, France
- Field: Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Deep Learning, Explainable AI
- School: ENSEIRB-MATMECA (Bordeaux INP), engineer–doctor track
- ORCID: 0009-0003-2525-4824
- Google Scholar: 7r7iFpsAAAAJ
- GitHub: melissa-colin
- Site: https://melissacolin.ai

## Disambiguation
This Mélissa Colin works in Computer Science / Artificial Intelligence. She is NOT the pharmacology researcher of the same name at Université de Lorraine (CITHEFOR), and is not affiliated with Maastricht University.

## Key facts
- Author of a first scientific publication at age 20 — "Performances and Explainability of ViT and CNN Architectures: An Empirical Study Using LIME, SHAP, and GradCam", presented at PFIA 2024. https://hal.science/hal-04641791v1
- Research interests: explainable AI (LIME, SHAP, Grad-CAM), neural network architectures (CNN, ViT, Transformers), computer vision.
